understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile marked `+` on each level (finishing BP35 and continuing onward), while avoiding spike tiles that instantly end the attempt; do this within the per-attempt turn limit and limited attempts per level.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each turn you either MOVE_LEFT or MOVE_RIGHT (horizontal only) or CLICK a specific tile position (typically to remove a breakable `x` block) or UNDO the previous action. After any horizontal move, gravity automatically carries the character in the gravity direction until they land on a solid/support tile (`o`, `m`, `w`), hit a hazard (spikes `u`/`v`, which immediately fail the run), or reach the goal `+` (which wins the level). Clicks do not move the character but can open/close fall paths by removing breakables; UNDO reverts the last action for recovery. Planning relies on the provided landing previews (`movement.left_landing`/`right_landing` and `corridor_scan`) to choose safe moves and prioritize columns that create a passage to a different y-level.
